neighborhoods.name: Malaga Centro Historico
neighborhoods.description: Revitalized city center with Picasso Museum, Roman theater, Moorish Alcazaba, and pedestrian Larios Street

housing.predominantType: Apartments in renovated historic and modern buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Málaga. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Torremolinos / Benalmadena
neighborhoods.description: Western coastal towns with extensive beaches, marina, and established tourism infrastructure

housing.predominantType: Apartments, beach condos, and urbanization properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Málaga's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Fuengirola
neighborhoods.description: Large expat town with one of the longest promenades in Spain and established international community
neighborhoods.character: Expat town, long promenade, international services
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Marbella / Nueva Andalucia
neighborhoods.description: Luxury resort area with Puerto Banus marina, golf courses, and celebrity associations
neighborhoods.character: Luxury resort, Puerto Banus, golf and glamour

housing.predominantType: Luxury villas, modern apartments, and resort properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
